case_title: ANN MCFARLAND DRAPER VS. PRESTON MARKS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 78532419)
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENFORCING OWNER'S RIGHT OF ACCESS FOR ENTRY AND REPAIRS AND FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DRAPER, ANN MCFARLAND AN INDIVIDUAL

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS OFF CALENDAR. THE ORDER DENYING A TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER REQUIRED PLAINTIFF TO PERSONALLY SERVE DEFENDANT BY JUNE 16, 2025 AND TO FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE BY JUNE 17, 2025. PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE BY THIS DATE. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION
Off Calendar Jul-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: OFF CALENDAR. The Order denying a Temporary Restraining Order required Plaintiff to personally serve Defendant by June 16, 2025 and to file a Proof of Service by June 17, 2025. Plaintiff did not file a Proof of Service by this date. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
